Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; Fo
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky appeared by zoom for petitioners.
John Minton appeared by zoom for Li Yi Lau (respondent/trustee).

Mr. Zabronsky stated that there is a proposal to do ADR (Alternative Dispute Resolution) by early May. The court spoke of issuing a case management order, and explained how it works and what will be expected of the parties. The Petition to Invalidate Trust, etc., and status of ADR are continued to June 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A joint statement regarding ADR is to be filed by June 21, 2023. Trial is set for January 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; Fo
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Mar-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Mattriciani, via Zoom, for Jeannette Chu, John Gomez, Richard Chan, William Gomez, and Ray Gomez, Petitioners; John Minton, via Zoom, for Li Y. Lau, Objector.

Mr. Mattriciani reports on the status of discovery, that there are pending depositions, and that there have been discussions of scheduling mediation sometime at the end of January or at the beginning of February 2023. Mr. Minton confirms the preceding.

The matters are continued to Mar-20-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; Fo
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; Fo
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Oct-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky, via Zoom, for Jeanette Chu, John Gomez, Richard Chan, William Gomez, Ray Gomez, Petitioners; John Minton, via Zoom, for Li Yi Lau, Objector.

Mr. Zabronsky reports that there has been some discovery completed and that the parties are ready to mediate. Mr. Minton agrees with the report regarding mediation but advises that he'd prefer to complete additional discovery and discuss the preceding with his clients, first, and that he intends to continue to meet and confer with Mr. Zabronsky. Counsel reports that they are amenable to either pro bono or private mediation.

The matter is continued to Oct-03-2022 at 9:00 in Dept. 204. Status of ADR is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; Fo
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Matricciani, via Zoom, for Jeanette Chu, John Gomez, Ray Gomez, William Gomez, and Richard Chan, Petitioners; John Minton, via Zoom, for Li Yau, Respondent.

Both counsel report on the status of discovery. Mr. Matricciani reports that some discovery has been served and of ongoing meet and confer. The court confirms with counsel that the parties have yet to discuss ADR options. Mr. Minton reports of the progress the case has made since the previous calling of this matter and advises that there is a key deposition set tomorrow of Catherine Yee, who was Leon and Maria's estate planning attorney who drafted the trust instruments that are the subject of this proceeding. The court confirms with counsel that the matter is eligible to participate in the court's pro bono mediation program and urges counsel to consider the program.

The Petition to Invalidate Trust, etc., is continued to Aug-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; For Financial Elder Abuse; For Unfair And Deceptive
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Continued To May-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky appeared by zoom for Petitioners.
John Minton appeared by zoom for Respondent/Trustee.

The court raised the issue of notice to Bobby's child who was born in 1995, asked if they know the individual's name and asked where the principal place of administration of this trust is. Mr. Zabronsky stated that he does not know the individual's name, and that his position is that notice is owed to the beneficiaries and the heirs who are impacted by the contest. Mr. Zabronsky also stated that there are lots of grandchildren none of whom have been given notice because none of them are heirs under the instrument that is being challenged and that they are not heirs because in each case their parent is alive. In addition, Mr. Zabronsky stated that he does not see why this child more than any other grandchild should receive notice. Mr. Minton stated that the principal place of administration of the trust is at the Bay Street property. The court stated that filing of a family tree would be helpful to the court, noted that the preliminary response was served on Mr. Zabronsky rather than the individual petitioners, that both sides are talking about an evidentiary hearing and asked if there has been any thought of any ADR or mediation. Mr. Zabronsky stated that the petitioners waive notice, that there has not been any discussion about any ADR yet, that they plan to do some discovery first and that it would be appropriate to continue the matter so that the parties can undertake some discovery and discuss any ADR programs. Mr. Minton agrees stating that the parties are just getting started and some discovery would be helpful for each side to understand the other's position. The Petition to Invalidate Trust, etc. is continued to May 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
